allowedCurrentClaim: Live billing is operator-approved live with partial artifact-backed evidence and accepted evidence risk.
blockedClaims: Full evidence-proven production maturity is not claimed.
Fully artifact-proven Stripe live completion is not claimed.
Tax, invoice, accounting, and legal compliance completion are not claimed.

releasePlanSummary.releaseTruth: Use config/release-compat.json and npm run release:plan for concrete migration and deploy checkpoints.

stripeDashboardChecklist: Subscribe live webhook endpoint to checkout, subscription, invoice, refund, and dispute events listed in the Markdown packet.
Confirm live credit-pack Prices match the BITBI public catalog.
Confirm BITBI Pro live monthly Price ID matches the configured Cloudflare var.
Configure Stripe Customer Portal before enabling member portal use.
Keep optional tax and invoice features disabled until reviewed.
canarySequence: Deploy Auth Worker and Static Pages.
Export redacted status before live flags.
Keep optional tax/invoice flags false initially.
Enable live credit packs/subscriptions only for controlled canary when ready.
Run one credit-pack canary with a dedicated member account.
Confirm no credit before verified webhook.
Confirm exactly-once credit grant after verified live checkout.session.completed.
Replay or duplicate webhook and verify no double grant.
Run BITBI Pro subscription canary with a dedicated member account.
Confirm subscription state and invoice.paid or invoice.payment_succeeded top-up once.
Open Stripe Customer Portal from member Credits page and verify member-only portal behavior.
Verify failed invoice, refund, and dispute handling is review-only.
Only then review go/no-go for public release.
rollbackPlan: Keep webhook endpoint available for already-created Stripe events unless intentionally retiring.
Do not delete ledger, subscription, checkout, billing event, review, or evidence rows.
Inspect Billing Reviews and Reconciliation before changing Stripe routing.
